name: Phase 34: Dual-SDK Test Hardening
description: Audit and harden dual-SDK support. Ensure all compat.go aliases cover go-sdk types, create _official_test.go files, set up dual-SDK CI, and document migration path.
completion: All compat aliases verified, official SDK tests pass, CI runs both SDK variants, migration guide exists.

tasks.description: Audit registry/compat.go and all _official.go files. List every mcp-go type alias and verify go-sdk equivalents exist. Document gaps in a tracking table.
Fix any compat.go gaps found in audit. Add missing type aliases, adapter functions, or build-tagged implementations.
Create _official_test.go files for registry, handler, and mcptest packages. These files use //go:build official_sdk tags and verify all public APIs work with go-sdk types.
Set up CI matrix that runs 'go test ./...' with both default (mcp-go) and 'official_sdk' build tags. Both must pass for PR merge.
Bump mcp-go dependency from v0.43.2 to latest stable. Fix any breaking changes. Run full test suite.
Write migration guide documenting: (1) which compat.go aliases to use, (2) how to switch from mcp-go to go-sdk, (3) dual-SDK build tag usage, (4) known limitations.
